amount-decimals-text: Enabling this option will allow the system to add decimals when producing. Otherwise, it is assumed that whole numbers will be used.
change-reference-confirm:
This process CANNOT be undone.
By checking this option, I confirm that I want to change the reference
confirm-quantities-text: Enabling this option will force the user to confirm that the quantities entered in the production order are verified, adding an additional confirmation step when producing.
cost-in-report-text: Indicate whether the prescription costs should be printed on the prescription print report.
cost-update-policy-text: Indicate what happens when the cost price of an ingredient changes. 'Ingredients only' recalculates the cost of recipes that use it. 'Ingredients and produced' also updates the cost of manufactured products.
duplicate-code-text: Indicates whether the recipe code can be duplicated. If 'Do not duplicate' is selected, the system will NOT allow saving the recipe if the code already exists.
duplicate-recipe-code: There is already another recipe with the code %code%
error-order-status: The status of the production order does not allow this action to be performed.
missing-numserie: The serial number for product %product% is missing.
numserie-prefix-desc: Empty to use the code as a prefix
numserie-traceability-error: Error. Serial numbers and traceability cannot be activated simultaneously.
numserie-used-and-delivery: The serial number cannot be consumed and sold at the same time.
order-produce-ok: The %order% order has been produced successfully
print-recipe-cost: Include cost data when printing the prescription
recipe-clone-production-error: Error cloning the products to be produced from the recipe %recipe%
recipe-produce-ok: %quantity% units of the recipe %recipe% have been manufactured.
recipeline-save-error: Error saving the line %line% of the recipe %recipe%
reference-migrate-complete: Reference migration complete. %count% references have been updated.
reference-migrate-error: Error migrating reference. You must deactivate and reactivate the plugin.
separator-text: If indicated, the text entered will be added as a separator between the serial number prefix and the counter.
warehouse-source-desc: Warehouse from which the raw material is obtained
warehouse-target-desc: Warehouse where the produced product goes
